target_role: names the missing bounded transition evidence needed before any finite-state termination or restricted-edge discharge can use the finite state-space witness

transition_target_shape.input: restricted finite state-space witness plus restricted instance scope
transition_target_shape.output: bounded transition relation or successor data over StateModel := Fin 256

positive_claim: records the next bounded transition target over the restricted finite state-space witness
missing_object: actual bounded transition relation or successor data over StateModel := Fin 256
non_claims: does not construct the restricted edge
does not construct the source-field bridge
does not prove field-by-field obligation discharge
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Supply bounded transition relation evidence over StateModel := Fin 256, or keep transition data as an explicit missing object.
